groups.name: Core Study Spaces
groups.description: The rooms members return to most often for focused work, accountability, and consistent study habits.
channels: Study Lounge Rooms for silent general study
Study-On-Cam Rooms for strict on-cam accountability
Pomodoro Rooms with automated focus and break timers
Voice Study Rooms for tutoring and collaborative sessions
Custom Study Rooms for flexible private or semi-private setups

groups.name: Libraries and Resources
groups.description: Spaces built to support both academic needs and lighter reading.
channels: Academic library spaces for study support and learning materials
Leisure library spaces for reading beyond coursework
Resource-sharing spaces for useful study systems and references

groups.name: Community and Wellness
groups.description: Channels that help the server stay human, supportive, and sustainable.
channels: Interest Clubs for members with shared hobbies and interests
Freedom Wall for anonymous journaling and mental health expression
Supportive community spaces for encouragement and connection

groups.name: Recognition and Participation
groups.description: Spaces that celebrate consistency and meaningful contribution.
channels: SWM Hall of Class I Users

groups.name: Future Expansion
groups.description: Planned growth areas for the server as the website and community continue to evolve.
channels: More detailed guides for finding the right spaces quickly
